manga.title: Private Tutoring in These Trying Times
manga.description:
In these trying times, hiring a private tutor for a study session at home is a necessity! Yu-chan is in a precarious situation because of his student's seduction attempts... Right here and now, a sweet secret private tutoring begins!

**Original Webtoon:**  
R19: [Toomics](https://m.toomics.com/webtoon/episode/toon/5819), [Onestory](https://onestory.co.kr/detail/H041192607), [Nate](https://toonnbook.nate.com/detail/H041192607)  
R15: [Toomics](https://www.toomics.com/webtoon/episode/toon/7714)

**Official Translation:**  
R19: [English](https://toomics.com/en/webtoon/episode/toon/5819), [S.Chinese](https://toomics.com/sc/webtoon/episode/toon/5819), [T.Chinese](https://global.toomics.com/tc/webtoon/episode/toon/5819), [French](https://toomics.com/fr/webtoon/episode/toon/5819), [Spanish](https://toomics.com/es/webtoon/episode/toon/5819), [German](https://toomics.com/de/webtoon/episode/toon/5819), [Japanese](https://toomics.com/jp/webtoon/episode/toon/5819)
